title: Strange Pains Announce Debut Album The Diamond District: Hear “Walking With Yves”
author: Danielle Chelosky
summary:
Since December, Strange Pains have released the songs “Boomerang,” “Memory Man,” and “Soon And So On.” Today, the project of Empty Country member Ted Bradley is back with the announcement of a double album called The Diamond District. The first volume, which serves as his debut, arrives this fall, and the new single “Walking With Yves”…

The post Strange Pains Announce Debut Album <em>The Diamond District</em>: Hear “Walking With Yves” appeared first on Stereogum.
full_text:
Since December, Strange Pains have released the songs "Boomerang," "Memory Man," and "Soon And So On." Today, the project of Empty Country member Ted Bradley is back with the announcement of a double album called The Diamond District. The first volume, which serves as his debut, arrives this fall, and the new single "Walking With Yves" is out now.

"Walking With Yves" is breathless banger, overflowing with adrenaline and an infectious feeling of invincibility. About the song, Bradley told Under The Radar, "Certain delusions let us carry contradictory feelings with absolute conviction. We can be convinced we’ve learned something in the harsh light of day, only to forget it as quickly as we saw it. A jarring, human phenomenon."

The Diamond District has his Empty County bandmate Joseph D'Agostino (formerly of Cymbals Eat Guitars) on producing, engineering, and mixing. Hear "Walking With Yves" below.

TRACKLIST:
01 "Camino"
02 "Boomerang"
03 "Memory Man"
04 "Waiting In Water"
05 "Walking With Yves"
06 "Lucifer Disguised"
07 "Soon And So On" 
08 "Tripple Over Time"
09 "(Untitled)"
10 "Outside Today"

The Diamond District, Volume 1 is out 9/18 via Best Brother Records. Pre-order it here.
